description.ko: 액체 크롬이 진동하여 어두운 공허 속에 홀로그램 링과 기하학적 빛 입자를 생성하는 소리의 시각화입니다.
description.en: A visualization of sound where liquid chrome vibrates to create holographic rings and geometric light particles in a dark void.

prompt: A cinematic high-tech visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Harmonic Resonance Sphere.' A central floating core of liquid chrome vibrates violently, generating complex 3D holographic rings that manifest as #4169E1 royal blue waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples. As the sound frequency peaks, the air crystallizes into #32CD32 green geometric particles and #FFD700 gold light trails. Set against a dark studio void, featuring hyper-realistic ray tracing and intricate UI elements that react perfectly to invisible bass frequencies. 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance of sound rendered in physical light.
